scripts.build: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NEXT_PRIVATE_BUILD_WORKER_COUNT=1 prisma generate && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NEXT_PRIVATE_BUILD_WORKER_COUNT=1 next build --webpack && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static
